auth.loginError: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Connect and manage your code repositories
projects.noProjects: No projects yet. Connect your first repository.
projects.loadError: Could not load projects. Please try again.

createDialog.title: Create Project
createDialog.error: Failed to create project. Please try again.

deleteProject.confirmBody: Remove {{name}} and detach all its repositories? Indexed data stays in the database but nothing will sync.
deleteProject.error: Could not delete project. Please try again.

attachDialog.title: Connect Repository
attachDialog.urlHint: Supports GitHub and GitLab, including self-hosted GitLab instances.
attachDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: No README description found — add one yourself.
attachDialog.error: Failed to connect repository. Please try again.
attachDialog.webhookWithToken: Auto-sync via webhook will be set up when you connect (requires repo admin access).
attachDialog.webhookWithoutToken: Webhooks require a token. You can re-index manually or reconnect with a token.

errors.notFound: Repository not found. Check the URL or your access token.
errors.probeFailed: Could not reach the repository. Check the URL and try again.
errors.tokenRequired: Enter an access token to continue.

github.label: GitHub
steps: Open GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens.
Click "Generate new token" (classic) and give it a name.
Select the "repo" scope to read private repositories and manage webhooks.
Generate the token and paste it below — it is only used to connect this repository.

gitlab.label: GitLab
steps: Open GitLab → your avatar → Edit profile → Access Tokens.
Give the token a name and select the "api" scope.
Create the token and paste it below — it is only used to connect this repository.

gitlabSelfHosted.label: GitLab (self-hosted)
steps: Open your GitLab instance → your avatar → Edit profile → Access Tokens.
Give the token a name and select the "api" scope.
Create the token and paste it below — it is only used to connect this repository.

repoCard.deleteConfirmBody: Remove {{name}} from this project? Indexed data stays in the database but the repo will no longer sync.
repoCard.reindexError: Could not start re-index. Please try again.
repoCard.reindexInProgress: Indexing is already in progress. Try again in about 10 minutes.
repoCard.deleteError: Could not delete repository. Please try again.
repoCard.webhookOnTooltip: Auto-sync is on. CodeSage re-indexes this repository automatically after every push.
repoCard.webhookOffTooltip: Auto-sync is off. After you push changes to this repository, click Re-index to pull the latest code and re-index it.

hero.body: Start a conversation to ask questions about your codebase. Choose Developer mode for code-level queries or End-User mode for navigation and workflow help.
